phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: That's half time.

phrases.text: The referee brings the first half to a close.

phrases.speaker: commentator

phrases.speaker: commentator

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: From Malcolm Grange and Jimmy Michaels, thanks for joining us.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: We are heading into extra time.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Penalties will decide it.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The midfield line needs to be braver there.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: They are defending the box, but not the pass into it.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The back four have to hold their line better.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: There is too much space between defence and midfield.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: That press worked because the nearest midfielder stepped in.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: If they press like that, the wide players must cover behind.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The run across the defender made the chance.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: That was good movement, but the final pass needed more care.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: They are getting joy when they move it early.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The striker has pinned both centre backs there.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: That's excellent goalkeeping because he stays big for as long as possible.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The save looks simple, but the footwork before it is the important bit.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: That goal is all about the timing of the run.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The finish is good, but the pass before it is even better.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: They earned that by moving the ball with speed.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The goalkeeper had no chance once the shot went across him.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: That's the kind of foul that comes from being half a yard late.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The referee has managed that sensibly.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The forward has to watch the defensive line there.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: It's a good line from the defence.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Set pieces are where concentration matters most.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The first defender has to attack this delivery.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: This is as much nerve as technique now.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The taker has to commit and trust the strike.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: At half time, the big thing is whether the midfield can keep the back line connected.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The first half had spells of control, but both sides can still be sharper in the final third.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Over the whole match, the side that managed the ball better deserved the result.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: There were spells where both teams had control, but the decisive moments mattered.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: I think the first twenty minutes will tell us plenty. Whoever settles on the ball should control the rhythm.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The key for me is how quickly both midfields get close to their back four. If the gaps open, there'll be chances.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Set pieces could matter today. There are a few players out there who'll attack the first ball with real intent.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: That's exactly what you want in the box: one touch, no hesitation, finish it.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The defending is stretched, but the run makes the finish possible.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He reads the strike early and gets his body behind the line of the ball.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Good goalkeeping isn't always pretty. That's about narrowing the angle and staying set.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The idea is right, but he opens his body a fraction too early.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: That's a warning for the defence. The next one might not miss.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The back line has to move with the midfield there, not sit on top of the keeper.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: They're compact now, and that makes the pass through the middle much harder.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He's a steady goalkeeper. His starting position gives the defenders confidence.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He's a defender who likes to step in early. The important thing is keeping the line connected.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He's a good midfield player. He keeps the ball moving and gives the team a rhythm.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He's a dangerous forward. If the service comes early, he'll keep the centre backs busy.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: For a keeper, the calm decisions matter as much as the saves.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: For a defender, the best work is often done before the tackle has to be made.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: In midfield, he's got to play with his head up and spot the runners.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: As a forward, it's all about timing the movement and staying sharp in the box.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: It's there! What a strike!
phrases.previousText: A shot flies towards the top corner.
phrases.nextText: The ground erupts behind the goal.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Oh, that is top drawer!
phrases.previousText: The ball is lashed beyond the goalkeeper.
phrases.nextText: The scorer wheels away towards the corner flag.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He's buried it!

phrases.nextText: The net is still shaking.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Into the roof of the net! Magnificent!

phrases.nextText: Teammates pile in to celebrate.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: That's a goal worthy of winning any match!
phrases.previousText: A sweeping move ends with a clinical finish.
phrases.nextText: The supporters are on their feet.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: In off the upright! They all count!
phrases.previousText: The shot clips the post on its way through.
phrases.nextText: The goalkeeper can only look back at the net.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He's caught that one sweetly and it flies in!

phrases.nextText: A roar goes round the ground.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: What a finish! Right into the corner!
phrases.previousText: The forward steadies himself in the box.
phrases.nextText: The bench is up celebrating.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The keeper had no chance whatsoever!
phrases.previousText: The shot arrows towards the far corner.
phrases.nextText: The defence stands with hands on hips.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Oh yes! That is special!
phrases.previousText: The ball drops invitingly outside the area.
phrases.nextText: The crowd salutes a wonderful goal.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: It's flown in! Absolutely flown in!
phrases.previousText: A thunderous effort beats the goalkeeper all ends up.
phrases.nextText: Even the away end applauds that.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A goal of the highest quality!
phrases.previousText: A flowing move is finished in style.
phrases.nextText: The replay will be worth watching again.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: And they're level! All square once more!
phrases.previousText: The trailing side finally finds the net.
phrases.nextText: The match has come alive again.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The equaliser! Right back in it!
phrases.previousText: The pressure tells and the ball crosses the line.
phrases.nextText: Everything to play for now.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: They've pulled themselves level! Game on!
phrases.previousText: A scramble in the box ends with a goal.
phrases.nextText: Both benches are animated.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: And now they lead! The advantage is theirs!
phrases.previousText: The deadlock is broken at last.
phrases.nextText: The scorers' end is bouncing.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: They've got their noses in front!
phrases.previousText: A patient spell ends with a decisive finish.
phrases.nextText: The opposition must respond now.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The breakthrough, and they lead!
phrases.previousText: A tight contest is tipped by a single moment.
phrases.nextText: The manager punches the air on the touchline.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: And there's more! Daylight between the sides now!
phrases.previousText: The leading side strikes again.
phrases.nextText: The travelling supporters fall quiet.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: They've added to the lead! Surely safe now!
phrases.previousText: The dominant side finds another goal.
phrases.nextText: Heads are starting to drop in defence.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The cushion grows! They're in complete control!
phrases.previousText: Another wave of attack brings another goal.
phrases.nextText: This is turning into a comfortable afternoon.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A goal at the death! Astonishing scenes!
phrases.previousText: Deep into the closing stages the ball finds the net.
phrases.nextText: The ground has gone wild.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Late, late drama! Would you believe it!
phrases.previousText: The clock is almost done when the chance arrives.
phrases.nextText: There is barely time to restart.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: In the dying moments! What a time to score!
phrases.previousText: A final attack produces the goal.
phrases.nextText: The bench can hardly contain themselves.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: An early goal! Barely time to settle!
phrases.previousText: The match has only just begun.
phrases.nextText: What a start to the contest.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: They've struck inside the opening minutes!
phrases.previousText: The first attack of the game brings a goal.
phrases.nextText: The plans of the opposition are torn up already.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: What a start this is!
phrases.previousText: The net bulges with the game still young.
phrases.nextText: The crowd has barely found its seats.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: They've pulled a goal back, but the mountain remains!
phrases.previousText: The trailing side finds some reward at last.
phrases.nextText: Is there time for an unlikely comeback?

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A lifeline, perhaps! Still work to do!
phrases.previousText: The deficit is reduced with a sharp finish.
phrases.nextText: The scorers hurry the ball back to the centre circle.

phrases.text: A goal back, but they're still behind!

phrases.nextText: and the move quickens.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: picks out the run of
phrases.previousText: The pass is weighted just right.
phrases.nextText: in behind the defence.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: slips a lovely ball into
phrases.previousText: The defence is opened with one pass.
phrases.nextText: who takes it in his stride.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: opens them up for
phrases.previousText: The clever pass cuts through the middle.
phrases.nextText: with space to attack.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Now it falls to
phrases.previousText: Possession is exchanged in midfield.
phrases.nextText: to make something happen.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: It drops kindly for
phrases.previousText: A loose ball bounces in midfield.
phrases.nextText: who gathers it cleanly.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: And here comes
phrases.previousText: Space opens up ahead of the ball carrier.
phrases.nextText: striding forward with purpose.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He shapes to shoot, and lets it go!
phrases.previousText: The defender backs off outside the area.
phrases.nextText: Everyone in the ground follows the flight.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A snap shot from the edge of the area.
phrases.previousText: The ball breaks loose near the box.
phrases.nextText: The goalkeeper adjusts his feet quickly.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Hit on the half volley!
phrases.previousText: The ball drops over the shoulder.
phrases.nextText: The crowd holds its breath.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He drills it low towards the near post.
phrases.previousText: An angle opens up on the right side of the box.
phrases.nextText: The keeper scrambles across his line.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: What a hit that is!
phrases.previousText: The strike is unleashed from distance.
phrases.nextText: The whole ground rises to watch it.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: An optimistic effort from range.
phrases.previousText: The shot is taken on early.
phrases.nextText: The bench wanted a pass there.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He's caught it sweetly!
phrases.previousText: The ball sits up perfectly to be struck.
phrases.nextText: It fizzes towards the target.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Worked onto his stronger foot and struck.
phrases.previousText: A clever shimmy buys half a yard.
phrases.nextText: The effort is on its way.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Tipped over the bar!
phrases.previousText: The shot climbs towards the top corner.
phrases.nextText: The corner flag awaits.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: What a save! Simply magnificent!
phrases.previousText: The header looks destined for the net.
phrases.nextText: The defenders rush to congratulate their keeper.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Down smartly at the foot of the post!
phrases.previousText: A low drive skids towards the corner.
phrases.nextText: The danger is smothered.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He's clawed it off the line! Remarkable!
phrases.previousText: The ball seems certain to cross the line.
phrases.nextText: Nobody inside the ground can quite believe it.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Beaten away to safety!
phrases.previousText: The strike is firm and on target.
phrases.nextText: The rebound is cleared upfield.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Fingertips! Just enough to turn it past!
phrases.previousText: The shot bends late towards the corner.
phrases.nextText: The keeper picks himself up slowly.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Oh, that is goalkeeping of the highest order!
phrases.previousText: A point blank effort is somehow kept out.
phrases.nextText: The forward cannot believe it has stayed out.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He stood tall and kept it out!
phrases.previousText: The striker bears down on goal.
phrases.nextText: A vital stop at a vital time.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Inches wide! So close!
phrases.previousText: The shot beats the goalkeeper's dive.
phrases.nextText: The crowd lets out a collective groan.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: It shaves the upright on its way past!
phrases.previousText: The effort curls towards the far post.
phrases.nextText: A goal kick is the harsh reward.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Over the top! Agonisingly close!
phrases.previousText: The strike climbs from the edge of the box.
phrases.nextText: The shooter holds his head in his hands.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He's dragged it just past the post!
phrases.previousText: The chance opens up on the left side.
phrases.nextText: The keeper breathes again.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A whisker away! The crowd gasps!
phrases.previousText: The deflected effort drifts goalward.
phrases.nextText: Play restarts with nerves jangling.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: It flashes across the face of goal!
phrases.previousText: The low ball fizzes through the box.
phrases.nextText: Nobody could apply the final touch.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Skimmed the crossbar! Almost something special!
phrases.previousText: An ambitious effort from long range.
phrases.nextText: The keeper was rooted to the spot.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: How has that stayed out? Just wide!
phrases.previousText: A goalmouth scramble ends with a shot.
phrases.nextText: The defence finally clears its lines.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The post! It's come back off the post!
phrases.previousText: The strike beats the goalkeeper completely.
phrases.nextText: The rebound bounces clear of danger.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Rattled the crossbar! So nearly in!
phrases.previousText: A dipping effort drops late.
phrases.nextText: The bar is still trembling.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The woodwork saves them! Unbelievable!
phrases.previousText: The keeper is stranded as the shot flies in.
phrases.nextText: The defenders hack the loose ball away.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Off the bar and away! Inches from a goal!
phrases.previousText: The header is powered towards goal.
phrases.nextText: Both sets of players stand frozen for a moment.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: They pour forward in numbers.
phrases.previousText: The break is on after a turnover.
phrases.nextText: Defenders scramble to get back.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: This is a dangerous position now.
phrases.previousText: The ball is carried to the edge of the final third.
phrases.nextText: The back line drops deeper and deeper.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The full back has joined the attack!
phrases.previousText: An overlap develops down the flank.
phrases.nextText: There is an overload on the far side.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Suddenly there is room to run into!
phrases.previousText: The midfield is bypassed with one pass.
phrases.nextText: The crowd urges them forward.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: They've turned the defence completely!
phrases.previousText: A flick sends the ball in behind.
phrases.nextText: The covering defender is in a foot race.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: All of a sudden the game has opened up.
phrases.previousText: Both sides trade attacks at pace.
phrases.nextText: Chances feel close at either end.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A good ball here and they're in!
phrases.previousText: The runners stretch the defence either side.
phrases.nextText: The final pass is everything now.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The back line is retreating and inviting pressure.
phrases.previousText: The attack builds steadily through midfield.
phrases.nextText: The shooting chance may arrive any moment.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Plenty of time here for
phrases.previousText: The tempo drops for a moment.
phrases.nextText: to weigh up his options.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Calmly collected by
phrases.previousText: The loose ball is gathered without fuss.
phrases.nextText: in the middle of the park.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Composure here from
phrases.previousText: Opponents close in but the touch is assured.
phrases.nextText: to keep the move alive.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A tidy touch from
phrases.previousText: The ball is brought under control instantly.
phrases.nextText: to take it away from trouble.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: No rush at all from
phrases.previousText: The game settles into a quieter rhythm.
phrases.nextText: as he strolls forward with it.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Held up nicely by
phrases.previousText: The forward shields the ball from his marker.
phrases.nextText: waiting for support to arrive.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: An unhurried spell from
phrases.previousText: The ball is passed around the back.
phrases.nextText: as they look to draw the press.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: All very comfortable for
phrases.previousText: The opposition sits off and waits.
phrases.nextText: at this stage of the game.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: No urgency just yet from
phrases.previousText: The move is built from deep positions.
phrases.nextText: as they probe for an opening.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: It's all
phrases.previousText: One side has taken charge of the ball.
phrases.nextText: at the moment, in fairness.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The tempo is being set by
phrases.previousText: The pattern of the half is becoming clear.
phrases.nextText: in the middle of the pitch.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Plenty of the ball just now for
phrases.previousText: The passing is patient and deliberate.
phrases.nextText: without seriously threatening yet.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Flag kick on the far side.
phrases.previousText: The ball is touched behind by a defender.
phrases.nextText: The taker trots over to the quadrant.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He'll swing this one in from the corner.
phrases.previousText: The ball is placed in the quadrant.
phrases.nextText: The box fills with bodies.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The big men are forward for this corner!
phrases.previousText: The centre halves make their way upfield.
phrases.nextText: Markers grab hold of shirts in the box.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Bodies everywhere in the box as the corner waits!
phrases.previousText: There is pushing and shoving before the delivery.
phrases.nextText: The referee has a word before allowing it.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A throw to be taken deep in the corner.
phrases.previousText: The ball trickles out of play.
phrases.nextText: The defence pushes up while it can.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He wipes the ball and looks for options.
phrases.previousText: The thrower takes his time over it.
phrases.nextText: Teammates shuffle along the touchline.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A long throw might cause problems here.
phrases.previousText: The throw is within range of the penalty area.
phrases.nextText: The keeper barks instructions at his defence.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Taken quickly to keep things moving.
phrases.previousText: There is no delay at the touchline.
phrases.nextText: Play flows on without a pause.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The keeper will send this one long.
phrases.previousText: The ball is placed for the goal kick.
phrases.nextText: Heads go up around the centre circle.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A welcome breather as the goal kick is placed.
phrases.previousText: The attack fizzles out behind the goal.
phrases.nextText: Both sides take a moment to reorganise.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He thumps it towards the halfway line.
phrases.previousText: The goal kick is struck firmly.
phrases.nextText: The midfielders compete for the drop.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The wall is being organised.
phrases.previousText: The referee paces out the distance.
phrases.nextText: The keeper lines everything up carefully.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He places the ball and weighs up the options.
phrases.previousText: The free kick sits in a tempting spot.
phrases.nextText: A delivery or a strike, nobody is sure.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A free kick in a useful position.
phrases.previousText: The foul brings play to a halt.
phrases.nextText: The attacking players gather around the ball.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A penalty! The ground holds its breath!
phrases.previousText: The referee points straight to the spot.
phrases.nextText: Protests are waved away.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: It's a spot kick! An enormous moment!
phrases.previousText: The challenge in the box is punished.
phrases.nextText: The taker tries to clear his mind.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The keeper sets himself on his line!
phrases.previousText: The ball sits on the penalty spot.
phrases.nextText: The whole ground falls quiet.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The free kick is given against
phrases.previousText: The whistle halts the move.
phrases.nextText: and few could argue with that.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Careless from
phrases.previousText: The challenge catches the man rather than the ball.
phrases.nextText: and the referee spots it.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The whistle goes, and it's a foul by
phrases.previousText: Bodies tangle in the middle of the park.
phrases.nextText: right in front of the referee!

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A late challenge there from
phrases.previousText: The ball had already gone when contact was made.
phrases.nextText: and the referee has a quiet word.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The referee wants a word with
phrases.previousText: Tempers flare after a heavy tackle.
phrases.nextText: before play can continue!

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: No complaints about that decision against
phrases.previousText: The free kick is awarded without protest.
phrases.nextText: and the game restarts quickly.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Into the book goes
phrases.previousText: The referee reaches for his pocket.
phrases.nextText: and he can have no complaints!

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A caution then for
phrases.previousText: The card is raised above the referee's head.
phrases.nextText: and he must be careful from here!

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The referee produces yellow for
phrases.previousText: The foul was always going to be punished.
phrases.nextText: after a cynical challenge!

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: His name is taken, and it's
phrases.previousText: The referee writes carefully in his notebook.
phrases.nextText: who walks away shaking his head!

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: An early bath for
phrases.previousText: The red card settles the argument.
phrases.nextText: and his afternoon is over!

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: It's red! Off goes
phrases.previousText: The referee makes the gravest call available to him.
phrases.nextText: to a chorus of noise from the stands!

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: He's been dismissed! It's
phrases.previousText: There is no reprieve from the referee.
phrases.nextText: trudging down the tunnel!

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The flag cuts the move short.
phrases.previousText: The through ball looks promising for a moment.
phrases.nextText: The free kick is taken without fuss.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Caught just beyond the last defender.
phrases.previousText: The run is timed a fraction too soon.
phrases.nextText: The forward raises a hand in apology.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A well judged trap by the back line.
phrases.previousText: The defence steps up together.
phrases.nextText: The linesman's flag stays raised.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The whistle goes and we begin.
phrases.previousText: Both sides are set in their positions.
phrases.nextText: The early exchanges will tell us plenty.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Off we go again from the middle.
phrases.previousText: The players return to their halves.
phrases.nextText: The ball is worked calmly to the back.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The ball is worked back from the centre circle.
phrases.previousText: The restart is taken without ceremony.
phrases.nextText: Both teams feel their way back into it.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Both sides settled, and play resumes.
phrases.previousText: The referee checks his watch one last time.
phrases.nextText: The contest picks up where it left off.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Time for a breather and a cup of tea.
phrases.previousText: The whistle sounds for the interval.
phrases.nextText: The teams head for the dressing rooms.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The players make their way down the tunnel.
phrases.previousText: The first half comes to a close.
phrases.nextText: There will be plenty said at the break.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: An interval to chew over what we've seen.
phrases.previousText: The half ends with the ball in midfield.
phrases.nextText: The analysis begins in the studio.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The whistle brings the half to a close.
phrases.previousText: A final attack comes to nothing.
phrases.nextText: Both managers will have words ready.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: And that is that.
phrases.previousText: The final whistle sounds across the ground.
phrases.nextText: The players exchange handshakes in the centre.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The handshakes tell the story at the end.
phrases.previousText: The contest is over.
phrases.nextText: Some leave delighted, others crestfallen.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Time for the weary legs to rest.
phrases.previousText: The players sink to the turf at the whistle.
phrases.nextText: The crowd shows its appreciation.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: That concludes our afternoon's entertainment.
phrases.previousText: The ground begins to empty.
phrases.nextText: Thoughts turn already to the next fixture.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The pitch looks immaculate this afternoon.
phrases.previousText: The camera pans across the playing surface.
phrases.nextText: The teams will emerge shortly.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The turnstiles have been busy and the terraces are full.
phrases.previousText: Supporters stream into the ground before kick off.
phrases.nextText: The atmosphere is building nicely.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Conditions look ideal for good football.
phrases.previousText: The flags barely move in the still air.
phrases.nextText: No excuses for either side today.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Programmes are out and the anticipation builds.
phrases.previousText: The pre-match rituals are nearly complete.
phrases.nextText: Kick off is only moments away.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He's caught that sweetly, right off the laces.
phrases.previousText: The crowd is still roaring as the replay of the goal rolls.
phrases.nextText: The celebrations settle and play restarts from the centre circle.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Look at the full back arriving late. Nobody picks him up.
phrases.previousText: The replay of the goal is rolling as the pundit weighs in.
phrases.nextText: Attention returns to the restart.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Top drawer, that. You don't save those.
phrases.previousText: The stadium is still buzzing after a fine strike.
phrases.nextText: The noise dies down as the teams line up again.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: It all starts with one lazy clearance, and they're punished.
phrases.previousText: A second replay shows the build up to the goal.
phrases.nextText: Play is about to restart from the centre circle.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: One lovely ball over the top and the defence is gone.
phrases.previousText: The goal is shown again from behind the play.
phrases.nextText: The commentator picks up the restart.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Simple goals, this game. Get it wide, get it in, gamble.
phrases.previousText: The pundit gives his view as the replay finishes.
phrases.nextText: The match resumes from the kick off.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He sets himself early, and that's why the save looks easy.
phrases.previousText: A fine save has just been shown again in replay.
phrases.nextText: The match settles back into its rhythm.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Quick feet across his line. The hands take care of themselves.
phrases.previousText: The replay lingers on the goalkeeper's stop.
phrases.nextText: Play continues from the resulting corner.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He shows him the outside, then takes it away. Clever keeping.
phrases.previousText: The pundit assesses the save as the replay runs.
phrases.nextText: Attention returns to the action on the pitch.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Watch his weight stay forward. That's textbook, that.
phrases.previousText: A slow motion replay picks out the goalkeeper's technique.
phrases.nextText: The game moves on with a goal kick.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: In my day that's a fair shoulder, but the whistle's gone.
phrases.previousText: The referee has just blown for a foul.
phrases.nextText: Players regroup as the free kick is prepared.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He's gone for the ball and got the man. That's a foul.
phrases.previousText: The challenge is shown again from the touchline camera.
phrases.nextText: The free kick is lined up.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Soft, for me. They give those far too easily nowadays.
phrases.previousText: The pundit watches the replay of the challenge.
phrases.nextText: Play resumes with the free kick.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: An honest challenge, just a fraction late. He'll know that himself.
phrases.previousText: The referee has a quiet word after the tackle.
phrases.nextText: The game restarts and tempers cool.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Whoever wins the midfield scrap usually wins the afternoon.
phrases.previousText: A lull in play gives the pundit a moment to assess.
phrases.nextText: Attention returns to the action on the pitch.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The far side full back is asleep there. Somebody must tell him.
phrases.previousText: The camera pans across the defensive line during a stoppage.
phrases.nextText: The commentator picks up the play once more.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: They've gone man for man in midfield and it's a proper battle.
phrases.previousText: The pundit surveys the pattern of the game.
phrases.nextText: Play continues in the middle of the park.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Both banks of four are sitting deep. Somebody has to take risks.
phrases.previousText: A wide shot shows both teams holding their positions.
phrases.nextText: The ball is worked patiently across the pitch.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Watch the spare man in the middle. Nobody's picking him up.
phrases.previousText: The pundit spots something as play slows down.
phrases.nextText: The commentator returns to calling the action.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The wide men aren't tracking back, and that's where the trouble starts.
phrases.previousText: A break in play allows a word on the team shape.
phrases.nextText: The match picks up its pace again.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: That's lovely stuff, one touch each and never a wasted pass.
phrases.previousText: A sweeping attacking move has just unfolded.
phrases.nextText: The commentator picks up the play once more.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Credit the winger there. He commits his man before releasing it.
phrases.previousText: The replay shows the attack developing down the flank.
phrases.nextText: Attention returns to the live action.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: They've gone through that midfield like a knife through butter.
phrases.previousText: The crowd applauds a flowing attacking move.
phrases.nextText: Play continues at a high tempo.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Good old-fashioned wing play, that. Beat your man, get it across.
phrases.previousText: The pundit reflects on the attack as play slows.
phrases.nextText: The match settles back into its rhythm.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: One side has bossed that half. The other needs a long talk.
phrases.previousText: The half time whistle has gone and the pundit gives his view.
phrases.nextText: Coverage heads to the interval break.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Honestly, you couldn't split them. A half of few clear chances.
phrases.previousText: The teams head down the tunnel at the interval.
phrases.nextText: The broadcast moves to the half time summary.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: A scrappy old half, lots of effort, not much quality.
phrases.previousText: The half time whistle brings a pause in the coverage.
phrases.nextText: The interval analysis continues in the studio.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: End to end, that. Both managers will want it tightened up.
phrases.previousText: The players walk off after a lively opening half.
phrases.nextText: Coverage heads to the interval break.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Over the piece, the better side has come out on top.
phrases.previousText: The final whistle has blown and the pundit gives his verdict.
phrases.nextText: The broadcast moves to the closing summary.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: A fair result, for me. Neither keeper had a quiet afternoon.
phrases.previousText: The players shake hands as the match ends.
phrases.nextText: The commentary team wraps up the coverage.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: They've ground that out the hard way, and they won't care a bit.
phrases.previousText: The final whistle sounds after a hard fought finish.
phrases.nextText: The broadcast moves to the closing summary.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Not one for the scrapbook, but the points are what matter.
phrases.previousText: The match ends and the pundit offers a final word.
phrases.nextText: The commentary team signs off.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Forget the keeper, pick your corner and hit it true.
phrases.previousText: A penalty has been awarded and tension fills the ground.
phrases.nextText: The taker places the ball on the spot.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: All the pressure is on the taker, and he knows it.
phrases.previousText: The crowd whistles as the penalty is prepared.
phrases.nextText: The referee waits for the area to clear.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He's gone too soon. A yard of patience and he's clean through.
phrases.previousText: The flag has gone up for offside.
phrases.nextText: The free kick is taken and play moves on.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Fair play to the linesman, that's a tight one to spot.
phrases.previousText: The replay checks the offside decision.
phrases.nextText: Play resumes with the free kick.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He talks his back four through the whole ninety. You can't coach that.
phrases.previousText: The commentator has just asked about the goalkeeper.
phrases.nextText: Talk returns to the match in progress.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Crosses are his bread and butter. He comes and claims everything.
phrases.previousText: The camera lingers on the goalkeeper as the question is asked.
phrases.nextText: Attention returns to the action on the pitch.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Nothing fancy. Heads it, kicks it, and the winger gets no change.
phrases.previousText: The commentator has just asked about the defender.
phrases.nextText: Talk returns to the match in progress.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He reads the game well. The first tackle is rarely needed.
phrases.previousText: The defender is picked out by the camera during a lull.
phrases.nextText: The commentary returns to the live play.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He does the running nobody notices. Every side needs one of those.
phrases.previousText: The commentator has just asked about the midfielder.
phrases.nextText: Talk returns to the match in progress.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Give him a yard and he'll find the forward's feet every time.
phrases.previousText: The midfielder is the subject of the broadcast chat.
phrases.nextText: The commentary picks up the action again.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He only needs one chance. Defenders hate playing against that sort.
phrases.previousText: The commentator has just asked about the forward.
phrases.nextText: Talk returns to the match in progress.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: He works the channels well and brings others into the play.
phrases.previousText: The forward is discussed during a quiet spell.
phrases.nextText: Attention returns to the action on the pitch.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Early tackles set the tone in these games. Expect a few.
phrases.previousText: Before kick off, the commentator asks for the pundit's view.
phrases.nextText: The teams make their way out for kick off.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The pitch looks quick, so the team that passes it should enjoy today.
phrases.previousText: The camera sweeps across the ground before the start.
phrases.nextText: The referee checks his watch ahead of kick off.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: For me, it comes down to who wants the second ball more.
phrases.previousText: The pre-match discussion turns to how the game might go.
phrases.nextText: The players complete their final warm up.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Both benches will preach patience, but the crowd won't allow it for long.
phrases.previousText: The pundit offers a final thought before the whistle.
phrases.nextText: The teams make their way out for kick off.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A relaxed atmosphere for this friendly match, but pride is still on the line.
phrases.previousText: The teams take the field for a friendly.
phrases.nextText: Both captains shake hands before kickoff.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: An exhibition match today, giving both managers a chance to try something new.
phrases.previousText: The players complete their final warmup.
phrases.nextText: The referee prepares to blow his whistle.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: We're in the group stage of the International Cup, where every single goal counts.
phrases.previousText: National anthems conclude at the stadium.
phrases.nextText: The players take up their starting positions.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: Knockout football in the International Cup. No second chances from here on out.
phrases.previousText: The crowd roars as the captains meet at the center circle.
phrases.nextText: The match is about to begin.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: An International Cup Quarter-Final, with a coveted semi-final place at stake.
phrases.previousText: The teams line up in the center of the pitch.
phrases.nextText: The referee looks at his assistant.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The Semi-Final of the International Cup! A historic final is just one win away.
phrases.previousText: Tens of thousands of fans fill the stadium with color.
phrases.nextText: The atmosphere is absolutely electric.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The International Cup Final! The eyes of the entire world are on this pitch.
phrases.previousText: The cup trophy stands on a pedestal by the tunnel.
phrases.nextText: The absolute pinnacle of the international game is here.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A classic cup tie today. The magic of the cup is definitely in the air.
phrases.previousText: Supporters have traveled in numbers for this cup match.
phrases.nextText: The players are ready to fight for the next round.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A massive cup Quarter-Final match. The semi-finals are within touching distance.
phrases.previousText: Flags are waving in the home stands.
phrases.nextText: The captains exchange club pennants.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A tense cup Semi-Final today. Getting this close to the final makes everyone nervous.
phrases.previousText: The stadium is packed to the rafters for the semi-final.
phrases.nextText: Kickoff is just moments away.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: The Cup Final! The biggest day in the domestic calendar, and the trophy is waiting.
phrases.previousText: The teams walk out side by side to a wall of sound.
phrases.nextText: A cup final showdown we will not forget.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: We are set for another crucial fixture in the English Top League.
phrases.previousText: The terraces are packed for this league match.
phrases.nextText: The referee gets ready to start play.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A big afternoon of league action as the battle for points intensifies.
phrases.previousText: Programmes are sold out and the stadium is buzzing.
phrases.nextText: The match officials lead the teams out.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A blockbuster clash near the top of the table. A true test of credentials.
phrases.previousText: It is a meeting between two heavyweights.
phrases.nextText: Both managers look focused on the touchline.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A tense basement battle today as both sides fight to escape the drop zone.
phrases.previousText: Nerves are high for this relegation battle.
phrases.nextText: Every tackle will matter today.

phrases.speaker: commentator
phrases.text: A classic league encounter between a high-flying side and one fighting at the bottom.
phrases.previousText: On paper, the difference is clear.
phrases.nextText: But anything can happen in ninety minutes.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: There are no points at stake, but players are still fighting for their places.
phrases.previousText: Before kickoff, the pundit looks down at the field.
phrases.nextText: It should be an open game.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: A good chance for both teams to build fitness and test their tactical setups.
phrases.previousText: The pundit shares his thoughts on the exhibition match.
phrases.nextText: Managers will want a clean sheet.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: In a short group stage, getting a good start is absolutely vital.
phrases.previousText: Before the match begins, the pundit evaluates the group stage.
phrases.nextText: A loss here puts you under massive pressure.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: It's win or go home now. One mistake could send a nation packing.
phrases.previousText: The pundit looks ahead to the knockout stage.
phrases.nextText: No room for errors today.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: We are reaching the business end now. Only eight teams remain.
phrases.previousText: The pundit previews the international quarter-final.
phrases.nextText: Every single player will feel the pressure.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: A nation's hopes rest on this game. The pressure must be immense.
phrases.previousText: The pundit focuses on the semi-final tension.
phrases.nextText: Only ninety minutes separate them from the final.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: This is the ultimate game. Winning today writes your name into history.
phrases.previousText: The pundit gazes at the cup final crowd.
phrases.nextText: The champions will be crowned today.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Cup football is all about who performs on the day. League form goes out the window.
phrases.previousText: The pundit gives his verdict on this cup match.
phrases.nextText: Expect a proper cup battle.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Getting this close to the final makes teams cautious. Expect a cagey start.
phrases.previousText: The pundit previews the domestic cup quarter-final.
phrases.nextText: Neither side will want to concede early.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: This is the cruelest round to lose. You can feel the nerves out there.
phrases.previousText: The pundit discusses the semi-final atmosphere.
phrases.nextText: It comes down to who handles the nerves.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Legends are made in finals. These players will remember today forever.
phrases.previousText: The pundit looks at the trophy before kickoff.
phrases.nextText: A special afternoon awaits us.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: At this stage of the campaign, every single point counts.
phrases.previousText: The pundit assesses the league fixture.
phrases.nextText: A draw is rarely enough.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: The league table doesn't lie, and today's result will have a major impact.
phrases.previousText: The pundit looks at the current standings.
phrases.nextText: A big ninety minutes ahead.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Two of the league's heavyweights going head-to-head. A real six-pointer.
phrases.previousText: The pundit discusses the top of the table clash.
phrases.nextText: This is the match everyone wanted to see.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: Neither team can afford to lose this. It will be a tense, scrappy match.
phrases.previousText: The pundit previews the relegation battle.
phrases.nextText: Expect plenty of commitment in the tackle.

phrases.speaker: pundit
phrases.text: On paper it looks like an easy win for the favorites, but surprises happen every week.
phrases.previousText: The pundit evaluates the gap between the sides.
phrases.nextText: The underdogs will relish this.
